name: BLAKE POUCH CYST
definition: embryonic midline outpouching of superior medullary velum extending inferior + posterior to
dominant_finding: mild indentation of inferior vermis / caudomedial aspects of cerebellar hemispheres ← mass
distribution: enhancing structure along anterosuperior aspect of cyst inferior to vermis = displaced choroid
discriminating_features: retrocerebellar / infraretrocerebellar cyst = diverticulum of enlarged 4th ventricle
enhancing structure along anterosuperior aspect of cyst inferior to vermis = displaced choroid
mild indentation of inferior vermis / caudomedial aspects of cerebellar hemispheres ← mass
NO supratentorial morphologic abnormalities aside from hydrocephalus

general: retrocerebellar / infraretrocerebellar cyst = diverticulum of enlarged 4th ventricle
enhancing structure along anterosuperior aspect of cyst inferior to vermis = displaced choroid
mild indentation of inferior vermis / caudomedial aspects of cerebellar hemispheres ← mass
NO supratentorial morphologic abnormalities aside from hydrocephalus
posterior fossa + cerebellum of normal size + shape
